ddls:
CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units_of_measure" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measure */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measure */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to base unit of measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the item belongs to */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measure for the item */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_levels" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory level */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse the inventory level belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the inventory level belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item in the warehouse */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage location */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse the storage location belongs to */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the storage location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the storage location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_locations" (
  "item_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item location */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse the item location belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the item location belongs to */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage location the item is stored in */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the storage location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES storage_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_locations_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_locations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse the order belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the order is for */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, received) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the order item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the order item is for */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_suppliers" (
  "item_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item supplier */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the supplier is for */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the supplier to deliver the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_suppliers_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_costs" (
  "unit_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit cost */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the unit cost is for */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the item */,
  "unit_cost_date" TEXT /* Date the unit cost was updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the unit cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_costs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_prices" (
  "item_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item price */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the price is for */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date the price was updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_prices_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, manager, employee) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
